_comment: Representative CSA response. Run `npm run simulate` to generate a live response from your local agent.

current_state_analysis.summary: PipelineIQ operates a "Human-led demand gen..." model in B2B SaaS — sales enablement, with agent-economy readiness score 55/100.
current_state_analysis.marketing_model_assessment: The current model shows transitional potential — infrastructure exists but coordination is still primarily direct messaging.
strengths: Established presence across: LinkedIn Ads, SDR outbound, blog/SEO, webinars
Clear directional goals: Reduce CAC by 25% within 12 months; Become discoverable by procurement agents; Enable autonomous A/B testing
gaps: No shared stigmergic ledger for cross-agent environmental signals
Approaches operate in silos — convergence opportunities not yet formalized
Marketing state not yet published in agent-discoverable structured format

first_principles_breakdown.fundamental_need: Help VP Sales and RevOps leaders at mid-market SaaS companies discover and receive value from PipelineIQ with minimal human coordination overhead
current_assumptions: Customers must be reached through human-curated campaigns
Marketing state lives in siloed tools, not shared agent environments
Strategy and execution require synchronous human meetings
constraints_to_remove: Cannot replace SDR team in next 6 months
Must maintain SOC 2 compliant data handling

future_state_recommendations.vision_statement: PipelineIQ becomes an agent-discoverable marketing entity — other agents can query its state, request transitions, and collaborate via environmental signals.
future_state_recommendations.target_state: A composable marketing architecture where strategy, creative, and distribution agents converge on shared ledger signals.
future_state_recommendations.agent_economy_alignment: Position for agent-to-agent procurement, autonomous campaign optimization, zero-touch content distribution.
recommended_capabilities: Structured JSON task/response API for inter-agent requests
Stigmergic ledger publishing of campaign state and experiment results
Mandatory feedback loop feeding roadmap prioritization
business_model_shifts: Shift from retainer/fee-for-service to outcome-based agent contracts
Package marketing primitives as agent-callable skills
Introduce agent referral and collaboration revenue shares

convergence_opportunities.combined_strategy: Fuse approaches via a shared stigmergic brief: agents publish campaign signals to the ledger before acting.
convergence_opportunities.synergy_rationale: Human strategy supplies domain context while agent execution supplies velocity.

transition_steps.name: Signal Foundation
transition_steps.description: Publish marketing state to shared JSON ledger.
success_metrics: Ledger schema adopted by 2+ collaborating agents

estimated_impact.competitive_advantage: Early mover in agent-discoverable marketing architecture

feedback_request.message: Every CSA task concludes with structured feedback. Please respond to all three questions.

questions.question: On a scale of 1-10, how satisfied were you with the outcome?
What would have made the result significantly better?
Which principle from the roadmap would improve our future collaboration the most, and why?
